# LM Designs & Balloons Co.
> Boutique custom balloon decorating service in Chicagoland, IL

## About
LM Designs & Balloons Co. is a custom balloon decoration and event styling service founded by Lindsey and Marina. We serve Chicago's western suburbs including Schaumburg, Elmhurst, Itasca, Naperville, and surrounding areas.

## Services
- Custom balloon garlands and arches
- LED balloon centerpieces and displays
- Balloon columns and backdrops
- Full event styling and decor

## Events We Decorate
Birthdays, weddings, baby showers, bridal showers, corporate events, graduations, anniversaries

## Service Area
Chicagoland western suburbs: Schaumburg, Elmhurst, Itasca, Naperville, Oak Brook, Addison, Lombard, Villa Park, Glen Ellyn, Wheaton

## Contact
- Website: https://www.lmballoons.com
- Email: LM.Designs.Balloons.Co@gmail.com
- Instagram: @lmdesignsandco
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/people/LM-Designs-Balloons-Co/61586605825525/

## Booking
Visit https://www.lmballoons.com/contact to request a consultation. We recommend booking 2-3 weeks in advance.
